entities.name: HEAD CAGE TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A technique for monitoring populations of Stenodiplosis sorghicola and screening sorghum genotypes for resistance

entities.name: SORGHUM MIDGE
entities.description: A pest, also known as Stenodiplosis sorghicola, that affects sorghum panicles

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The host crop being monitored for midge populations and screened for resistance

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum genotypes to resist infestation by the sorghum midge

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where the field study was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The seasonal period during which sorghum midge activity and density were higher

entities.name: POST-RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The seasonal period during which sorghum midge activity and density were lower
